name.ja: <ruby>顕現する伝説の都<rt>アトランティス・アドベント</rt></ruby>

text.en: This card's name becomes "Umi" while in the Spell & Trap Zone. You can only use each of the following effects of "Atlantis Advent" once per turn. During your Main Phase: You can place 1 "Atlantis, the Dragon City" or "Umi" from your Deck face-up in your Field Zone. If this card is sent to the GY: You can add 1 Level 7 Sea Serpent monster from your Deck to your hand.
